report.summary: Cycle-close v17: 4 new pages built since last cycle (defi-insurance-protocols, distributed-validator-tech, onchain-privacy, world-chain). 524 unique published slugs, 2 queue items ready. TS errors up to 142 across 5 files (from 46 — lido-v3 file now contributing bulk). git index.lock persists ~8h — 21 modified + 84 untracked files blocked from deploy.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: 524 unique published slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (up from 520 at v16), 103 legacy slugs still missing page.tsx (unchanged — wallets, taxes, investing, blog, older learn)

4 new pages built since last cycle: defi-insurance-protocols-guide-2026, distributed-validator-technology-dvt-guide-2026, onchain-privacy-infrastructure-guide-2026, world-chain-proof-of-personhood-guide-2026
2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items (onchain-privacy, world-chain) both have page.tsx — ready to promote next cycle

TypeScript errors increased to 142 across 5 files: crypto-arbitrage (4), crypto-index-funds (2), institutional-crypto-adoption (2), lido-v3-stvaults (bulk — JSX/comma errors on line 865), structured-data.examples.ts
lido-v3-stvaults-guide-2026/page.tsx is the main new regression contributor — needs JSX escaping fix
No live site HTTP checks possible (egress blocked from sandbox); all local file audits green
19 publish batch comments in published-pages.ts for today's date

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: 6/6 core API routes present and structurally sound: prices (60s), trending (300s), fear-greed (600s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (configurable)
All routes have stale-while-revalidate headers (2× TTL) and in-memory cache with fallback data
Health endpoint (/api/health) with CoinGecko + analytics + cache service checks
Rate limiter: only wired into /api/health — 0/6 core routes protected (carry-over P1 since Day 1)
CoinGecko free tier still in use — no API key, rate limit risk on traffic spikes unmitigated
No API route code changes this cycle — all stable

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest deployed commit: 21aaf5b (batch deploy: 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages)
No new deploy this cycle — all changes local only due to git lock
BLOCKER: .git/index.lock persists ~8+ hours — blocking all commits and deploy pipeline
Working tree: 21 modified files + 84 untracked files = 105 total pending changes
Key modified files: published-pages.ts (batches 1-18), globals.css, NotificationCenter.tsx, WhaleAlertFeed.tsx, 6 learn page fixes, 5 OG SVG updates
next.config.ts: ignoreBuildErrors=true shields Vercel from TS errors but masks lido-v3 regression
ACTION NEEDED: rm .git/index.lock → git add → commit → push to trigger Vercel deploy

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Shipped this cycle: 4 new learn guide pages built + OG images generated
Published to PUBLISHED_PAGES: solver-networks + aptos guides promoted (replaced by onchain-privacy + world-chain in queue)
Total content: 253 learn guide directories, 524 unique published slugs, 2 in queue
BLOCKER — git lock (Day 1): prevents commit/deploy pipeline. ~105 files pending. Must be manually cleared
BLOCKER — TS errors (142): lido-v3 page introduced bulk regression. Fix required before removing ignoreBuildErrors safety net
Carry-over P1: Wire rate limiter into 6 core API routes (unmitigated since launch)
Carry-over P2: Build page.tsx files for 103 legacy published slugs (wallets, taxes, investing/best, blog posts)
Next cycle: promote onchain-privacy + world-chain from queue, continue learn guide production
